Dallas Endocrinology medical records begin. Section divider and header page.

Current Medications and medication list. This report is for documentation purposes only. Hydrocortisone start date 07/01/2023. Fludrocortisone start date 07/01/2023. Authorized by prior office. Quantity and refill history documented.
DATE OF SERVICE: 07/21/2025. Dallas Endocrinology results follow-up documented for adrenal insufficiency and X-linked adrenoleukodystrophy after bone marrow transplant.

DATE OF SERVICE: 07/22/2025. ACTH level is still high after stress dosing. Renin is elevated. Increase baseline hydrocortisone to 10 mg in the morning and continue 7.5 mg in the afternoon and evening. Increase fludrocortisone to 0.1 mg daily.
DATE OF SERVICE: 07/22/2025. Nursing note: parent reports patient is tired, color changes quickly, lips are dry, and he is thirsty.
DATE OF SERVICE: 07/22/2025. Provider increased baseline hydrocortisone to 10 mg in the morning and fludrocortisone to 0.1 mg daily.
DATE OF SERVICE: 07/22/2025. Provider planned repeat electrolytes, ACTH, and renin testing in 4 weeks.
DATE OF SERVICE: 07/25/2025. If symptoms persist, contact the BMT team and/or go to the ER for evaluation.
